title: チーム総合力アップ・最高の差し入れ

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Hello, Trainer. Your team has really become
second to none!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
You all truly deserve a treat, so I splurged a little
on this present for you all.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I'm excited to watch your continued success. Best
of luck! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tazuna's special gift helps bring the team even
closer together. Now we're raring to go for the
Unity Cup!
